# Support Privacy Rights Workflow

- Route access, deletion, correction, export, and privacy-choice requests to the approved DSR queue.
- Verify the account before disclosing specific personal information or changing account data.
- Do not claim that a request is complete unless the DSR status says it is complete.
- Preserve authorized-agent and representative requests for the privacy team to validate.
- Opt-out and sensitive-data limit requests should be preserved without discouraging the requester.
